body.text: Post-Memorial Day open: Colorado's 152-page draft 'Specified Semiautomatic Firearms' list (SB25-003) remains the lead — sweeps in Walther CCP, Ruger 10/22 variant, Mauser M1916, Desert Eagle.

Reload Sunday analysis (Fogleman) documents the May 15 CO DOR draft sweeps far beyond AR/AK platforms. Federal courts reopen today; VA litigation now at day 12 (first scheduling-order-eligible business day). Two-week comment window closes ~June 1; final guidance July 1; Aug 1 effective.

facts.title: 1. Colorado SB25-003 draft list (152pp) — Day 2 ticker-lead
2. VA hardware-ban storyline — courts reopen, day 12
3. ATF gender-ID rule — Leider interview canonical reference

body.text:
• CO DOR draft 'Specified Semiautomatic Firearms' list (152pp, May 15) sweeps in CCP/10-22 variant
• NSSF May 18 compliance alert to CO dealers — two-week feedback window
• Reload Q&A pod (Sun) — DOJ-CO suits, SCOTUS 2A appetite, NFA future, ATF recordkeeping
• VA four-county prosecutor refusals hold at 4; four-suit landscape day 12, courts reopen
